title: fitParameters operation
description: Levenberg-Marquardt regression of thermoPackage parameters against experimental data. Outputs a fit log (chi^2 and parameter trajectory per iteration) and a parity CSV (model vs experiment at the optimum).

parameters.title: Parameters to fit
parameters.description: Each entry is a scalar in the thermoPackage to vary, with bounds and an initial guess. `path` is dot-separated (e.g. `activityModel.pairs[0].a_ij`).

residual.title: Residual definition
residual.description: What to fit against (e.g. T_bubble at a fixed P) and the experimental data points.

data.title: Experimental data (flat pairs of x, y)
